dishes.title: Shakshuka
dishes.description: Traditional oriental dish of eggs cooked in a spicy sauce of tomatoes, bell pepper, onion and garlic. The base is stewed with the addition of erosh anna paste, cumin, dry adjika and a mixture of peppers, forming a deeply aromatic sauce. Eggs are cooked directly in this tomato base, preserving the delicate runny yolk. The dish is complemented by shug, thina, fresh chili, cilantro and fried chickpeas in spices. Served hot with fresh croutons.

dishes.title: Milk punch cocktail
dishes.description: A gentle, velvety drink based on warm milk and rich black rum. The harmonious combination of soft creaminess and deep caramel notes creates a feeling of peace and warmth.

dishes.title: Scrambled eggs with salmon and avocado
dishes.description: Choice of eggs - okata (fried eggs) or soft scrambled eggs - paired with salmon and ripe avocado. Topped with arugula, pesto sauce, juicy cherry tomatoes and sprouts, this dish is a balanced and sophisticated breakfast.

dishes.title: Apple Pie Cocktail
dishes.description: A warming winter cocktail that combines the aroma of golden rum, the freshness of apple juice and the gentle sweetness of apple pie syrup. A light accent of fresh lemon adds balance, creating a taste of home comfort from the first sip.

dishes.title: Pear ice cream (Pear variegato gorgonzola) 0.055 gr
Ice cream Cheesecake with apricot 0.055 gr
White mulled wine
dishes.description: An aromatic hot drink based on white wine with the addition of orange, lemon, cinnamon, cloves and spicy honey. Light, citrusy, warming - with delicate acidity and a gentle aftertaste.

dishes.title: Scrambled eggs with sausages and mushrooms
dishes.description: A choice of eggs - okata (fried eggs) or tender scrambled eggs - paired with game sausages and succulent seasonal mushrooms. The dish is complemented by fresh arugula, pesto sauce and sweet cherry tomatoes, creating a rich and balanced breakfast.

dishes.title: Podil breakfast with boiled sausage
dishes.description:
A hearty and balanced breakfast with a local character.

The composition includes: boiled sausage, eggs, rucola, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, pesto sauce, caramelized onions, grain mustard and grated Parmigiano.

The combination of fresh vegetables, a tender egg and rich accents creates a perfect balance of taste to start the day.

dishes.title: Red mulled wine
dishes.description: A hot drink based on red wine with the addition of red vermouth, orange, cinnamon, cloves and honey. Rich, spicy and warming, with a deep aroma of wine and a light herbal note of vermouth.

dishes.title: BONA Punch
dishes.description:
A delicate, velvety cocktail with a dessert character and a light vinous freshness.

It is based on egg liqueur, which adds a creamy texture and mild sweetness. The white wine brings subtle acidity and a light fruity dryness, balancing the density of the liqueur. Natural apple juice reveals fresh, juicy notes of green apple, and vanilla syrup unites all ingredients in a warm, aromatic aftertaste.

dishes.title: Avocado toast
dishes.description: Toasted bread with soft cream cheese and fresh guacamole made with avocado, lemon juice and olive oil. The dish can be supplemented with a choice of: poached egg, salmon, prosciutto or shrimp(as in the photo), creating your own perfect breakfast.

dishes.title: Yushka from white forest mushrooms
dishes.description: Mushroom soup is a rich, aromatic soup cooked on forest seasonal mushrooms with the addition of fragrant porcini mushrooms. It has a deep taste, a light forest smokiness and a transparent, amber shade of the broth - a simple, but surprisingly noble Ukrainian dish.

dishes.title: Green salad with artichokes and truffle oil
dishes.description: Fresh mix of green leaves with tender artichoke, sun-dried tomatoes, carrots, olives and capers. Seasoned with fragrant truffle oil, which gives the salad a sophisticated aroma and depth of taste, creating a harmonious balance of fresh, salty and delicately spicy notes.

dishes.title: Baked eggplant with thina and oriental spices
dishes.description: Eggplant with thina and oriental spices is baked eggplant until soft, served with tender thina, juicy cherry tomatoes, aromatic pesto sauce and a spicy combination of herbs - cilantro and mint. The dish is complemented by red onions, capers and fresh herbs, creating a bright oriental taste and rich aroma.

dishes.title: Bruschetta with capia pepper
dishes.description: Bruschetta with Capi Peppers is a baked crispy bread on which tender thina, aromatic pesto, juicy red onion, a few drops of balsamic vinegar and a generous portion of greens - cilantro and mint - are combined. A light, fresh and spicy snack with a bright Mediterranean mood.

dishes.title: Beans in tomato sauce with mushrooms and mushrooms
dishes.description: Tender Yas beans stewed in a rich tomato sauce with aromatic mushrooms. The dish has a deep, homemade taste with a delicate acidity of tomatoes and distinct mushroom notes, which create a hearty and at the same time elegant vegetable composition.

dishes.title: Cauliflower steak with pesto sauce
dishes.description: A juicy roast cauliflower steak with a brown crust and a tender interior. It is served on cauliflower cream, complemented by aromatic pesto sauce and thina, which add depth, nutty notes and a delicate balance of taste to the dish.

dishes.title: Baked apple with nuts and prunes
dishes.description: A fragrant baked apple, generously drizzled with natural honey and topped with crunchy nuts. Served with delicate cream ice cream that melts from the warmth of the apple, creating a perfect contrast of temperatures and a harmonious balance of sweet, creamy and nutty notes.

dishes.title: Oatmeal with pancetta and poached egg
dishes.description: Creamy oatmeal in milk with Parmesan, topped with sun-dried tomatoes and green oil. A delicate poached egg and aromatic pancetta create a modern interpretation of the classic breakfast, which is emphasized by fresh sprouts.

dishes.title: Cheese oatmeal with pesto sauce and sun-dried tomatoes
dishes.description: Tender oatmeal in milk with cheddar and parmesan, enriched with pesto sauce and juicy sun-dried tomatoes. The final accent is a drop of aromatic green oil, which adds a bright Mediterranean character to the dish.

dishes.title: Oatmeal with seasonal fruits
dishes.description: Tender oatmeal on fragrant coconut milk with honey and a light accent of sugar. Served hot with seasonal fruit, almond flakes and fresh mint. A delicate touch of cornflower flowers adds an exquisite look and refined freshness.

dishes.title: Tartar with salmon, avocado and green sprouts
dishes.description: Tender, fresh, hand-sliced ​​salmon paired with creamy avocado and spicy capers for added character. A light citrus dressing emphasizes the natural freshness of the ingredients, and delicate sprouts complete the dish with an elegant accent.

dishes.title: Baked capsicum with feta cheese and herbs
dishes.description: Sweet baked Capi peppers combined with delicate feta cream. The dish is dressed with olive oil with a balsamic accent, garnished with fresh onions, cilantro, and basil, and topped off with a delicate blend of spices. A light and aromatic composition with a Mediterranean character.

dishes.title: Salmon carpaccio
dishes.description:
Thinly sliced ​​salmon fillet with light dressing and olive oil. Parmesan, arugula, and capers garnish create a harmony of tenderness and freshness.

This dish reflects the combination of the northern gifts of water with the Italian sophistication that Queen Bona brought to the Podil lands.

dishes.title: Marinated fathead minnow
dishes.description: Tender pieces of fathead mince, marinated in an aromatic combination of spices with parsley roots and chili pepper. Served with pickled onions and pink pepper - a delicacy worthy of a prince's table. Natural presence of bones may occur.

dishes.title: Slicing of local cheeses
dishes.description: Selected cheeses - parmino, caramel, gouda and brynza - in the company of honey, grapes and walnuts. Simplicity worthy of a royal table

dishes.title: Slicing of local meat
dishes.description: Thinly sliced ​​steak, Zinkiv sausage, smoked brisket and prune roll. Served with mustard, horseradish and spring onion - a gastronomic classic of Podillia.

dishes.title: A plate of dried delicacies
dishes.description: A sophisticated mix of raw beef and prosciutto, served with sun-dried tomatoes and selected olives. An ideal combination for true connoisseurs of gastronomic subtleties.

dishes.title: Vitello Tonato
dishes.description: Tender beef tenderloin, thinly sliced, served with an exquisite tonato sauce, a classic Italian dressing of tuna, anchovies, capers and olive oil, whipped to a delicate creamy texture. The dish is decorated with elderflowers and berries, crunchy pumpkin seeds, delicate microgreens and drops of fragrant green oil. The harmony of deep flavors and aristocratic refinement, worthy of a royal table.

dishes.title: Podilsk Salo
dishes.description: Delicate slices of lard with a meat vein, served with onions, garlic and spices. A tradition that has not lost its aristocratic charm.

dishes.title: Turkey pate
dishes.description: Tender turkey fillet stewed with apple and glazed with cocoa butter. Served with baked grapes, caramelized onions and freshly baked challah - an echo of ancient feasts.

dishes.title: Pate from Dniester catfish
dishes.description: Tender fillet of Dniester catfish is prepared using confit technology and beaten with stewed butter to a smooth texture, covered in panipuri and served on stones from the Dniester massif and snail roe.

dishes.title: Forshmak
dishes.description: Classic forshmak with tyulka, capelin caviar and pink pepper. Accompaniment – ​​apple sauce, pickled onions and olives. An elegant tribute to Eastern European traditions.

dishes.title: Hummus with shrimps
dishes.description: Tender spicy hummus accompanied by shrimp, avocado and tomatoes. The finish is greens, sublimated and spicy chili. Lightness of sea and fire.

dishes.title: Hummus with chicken hearts
dishes.description: Tender spicy hummus in combination with tender hearts, vegetables and spicy chili pepper is a bold accent for gourmets.

dishes.title: Hummus with vegetables and cream cheese
dishes.description: Tender spicy chickpeas with tahini, spices and chili pepper, served with vegetables, cheese and greens. A dish that Queen Bona once brought to Podillia

dishes.title: Barrel pickles from Fox
dishes.description:
A fragrant homemade selection of sauerkraut with onions and fragrant oil, juicy pickled cucumbers and tomatoes, hot pepper and spicy pickled garlic.

The real Ukrainian taste is bright, rich and appetizing.

dishes.title: Kholodets from three types of meat
dishes.description: Rich jello made from 3 types of meat - beef, pork and turkey, served with horseradish, croutons made from Vlaz bread and greens.

dishes.title: Salad with pumpkin, pear and prosciutto
dishes.description: A bright and balanced salad in which stewed pumpkin with cane sugar is combined with fresh pear, arugula and mint. Vinaigrette and pumpkin oil dressing emphasizes natural sweetness and freshness. Garnished with delicate gorgonzola cheese and sophisticated prosciutto crudo, which adds richness and a salty accent.

dishes.title: Salad with persimmons, beets under lemon marmalade
dishes.description: Beetroot, persimmon and goat cheese salad Beetroot, which has fed the Podil lands for a long time, is combined with sweet figs - a delicacy that was once brought from distant lands. Gentle goat cheese and honey-balsamic dressing and seasonal berries create a harmony of flavors, decorated with hazelnuts and cornflower flowers.

dishes.title: Shrimp and mango salad
dishes.description: Salad with shrimps, avocado and mango The combination of seafood and fruit is a luxury reminiscent of banquets in European courts. Shrimp in a honey-lime glaze served with tender avocado, mango and blue onion garnished with mint

dishes.title: Salad of veal, cruciferous vegetables and black pepper mousse
dishes.description: Veal sous vide is fried to a golden crust and placed on a plate with marinated mushrooms. Arugula, spinach, cherry tomatoes and green onions are placed on top. Mousse made from fermented black pepper sauce is added, decorated with pumpkin seeds.

dishes.title: Herring under a duvet with pike caviar
dishes.description:
Boiled potatoes, boiled carrots, egg, blue onion, quail egg mayonnaise, herring.

On top - green onions, salmon, pike roe and edible gold.

dishes.title: Salad of root vegetables and veal tongue
dishes.description: Potatoes, carrots, onions, green onions, eggs, pickles, green peas, quail egg mayonnaise, veal tongue.

dishes.title: Boiled red borscht with smoked pear
dishes.description: It is prepared on a brew of smoked pears. Lithuanian With the traditional addition of vegetables, a large amount of meat and fresh beetroot. Served with garlic lard, dumplings and sour cream.

dishes.title: White borscht from Maliivtsi
dishes.description: Traditional Podil white borscht on sugar beet with pumpkin, vegetables and homemade sour cream. It is cooked in broth with dried mushrooms and prunes. Served with tender stewed duck.

dishes.title: Hot jelly
dishes.description: A rich broth made from three types of meat - pork, beef and turkey - is warmed by the aroma of garlic oil and the slight spiciness of chili. Tradition in an unexpectedly sophisticated performance.

dishes.title: Pumpkin cream soup and cream cheese
dishes.description: Light and tender pumpkin cream soup with the natural sweetness of the vegetable, supplemented with crunchy sunflower seeds and aromatic pumpkin oil. Rose pepper adds a light spiciness, and cream cheese makes the texture of the soup more delicate and velvety.

dishes.title: Cheesecakes with sour cream and berries
dishes.description: Tender cheesecakes served with pear coulis and seasonal berries. The dish is decorated with fresh mint sprigs, almond flakes and a light layer of powdered sugar for a final sweet note.

dishes.title: Cocoa
dishes.description: Dense cocoa based on milk, cream and sugar with a rich velvety taste. The final accent is thin slices of Drohobych salt, which emphasize the depth of chocolate notes.

dishes.title: Dumplings with salty cheese, potatoes and hemp paste
dishes.description:
Traditional Ukrainian varenyki in an exquisite version - with tender potatoes and salty cheese. Served with sour cream, young cheese and hemp paste - a spicy combination of fried hemp seeds, garlic and aromatic broth.

Gastroexpedition. Recipe from Mrs. Lyudmila

dishes.title: Dumplings with bebeshka and fermented garlic sauce. Kiselivka
dishes.description:
Homemade dumplings with liver and beef

Tender filling of meat and liver in thin dough, topped with fried onions. Served with a sauce of fermented garlic and chicken hearts, a spoonful of thick sour cream, onion crunch and fresh parsley.

Gastroexpedition. Recipe from Mrs. Lyudmila:

"We have always made such dumplings for the holiday. I add a little hearts for the depth of taste, and the garlic sauce is a modern note. The main thing is to do everything with love."

dishes.title: Stuffing with duck from Maliivtsi
dishes.description: Juicy duck combined with forest mushrooms in the interpretation of Podil filling. Served with a sauce of fermented black pepper, porcini mushrooms and sun-dried tomatoes — the rich and noble taste of Podillia.

dishes.title: Podolsk artichoke with cheese sauce and pesto sauce
dishes.description: Steamed artichokes served with parmesan and pesto based sauces seasoned with dill salt and lemon. A European touch on the land of Podil — like Queen Bona's favorite dish.

dishes.title: Shrimps with saffron sauce, tomatoes and Podil wine
dishes.description: Juicy shrimp fried with capers and garlic in a delicate sauce made from Podilsk white wine, saffron and butter. Garnished with parsley and green oil. A real gastronomic accent.

dishes.title: Mussels in a creamy sauce with gorgonzola
dishes.description: Tender mussel meat, fried in olive oil, stewed in a creamy sauce with noble gorgonzola. A delicacy with a touch of Italian elegance.

dishes.title: Podolski onions with fermented pepper sauce
dishes.description: A classic dish from Podil cuisine - pieces of onion mixed with egg and flour, fried until golden brown. They are served with a unique mousse made from fermented black pepper, which adds piquant spiciness and subtle spiciness.

dishes.title: Malva Bakota tea
dishes.description: Malva tea from Bakota is a delicate flower tea made from wild Podil malva. It has a mild honey taste, a natural pink-purple color and a soothing effect. Ideal for evening rest

dishes.title: Pearl Bakota tea
dishes.description: Pearl of Bakota tea is an exquisite herbal tea made from selected Podil herbs, which gives a soft aroma of the steppe and a light sweetness. Light, harmonious and soothing - a real pearl of quiet Bakota.

dishes.title: Golubtsi according to the recipe of the village of Gorayvka
dishes.description: The author's interpretation from Podil: dumplings made of buckwheat, bulgur and semolina in delicate duck minced meat, stewed in vegetable and cream sauce. Sprinkled with sorghum and sunflower seeds, with meat sauce and crispy onion accent.

dishes.title: Oysters of the Podilsk tovtr
dishes.description: Delicate interpretation: stewed beef eggs in a creamy sauce with garlic, onion and dill. Tenderness and boldness of taste for true gourmets.

dishes.title: Beef cheeks with polenta
dishes.description: Slow-braised cheeks with vegetables in a wine sauce, served on parmesan polenta. Finished with crispy onion chips - a noble classic with an Italian accent.

dishes.title: Furmanivka bloodsucker with juniper
dishes.description: The author's interpretation of the traditional blood dish from Furmanivsk Hep, prepared with fried blood, which gives the dish a clean, deep taste without extra aromas. Served with tender mashed potatoes, crispy onions and a rich pepper sauce that adds a distinct, spicy character.

dishes.title: Beef tongues with fermented black pepper sauce
dishes.description: Tender beef tongues in a honey-meat glaze, served with potatoes in butter and pickled vegetables. The dish is finished with a noble sauce of fermented black pepper and onion crunch.

dishes.title: Lasagna with tomato sauce
dishes.description: Classic meat lasagna with layers of delicate dough and rich meat filling, stewed in aromatic tomato sauce. Especially juicy, with deep taste and delicate texture in every piece.

dishes.title: Duck leg with porcini mushrooms and vegetables
dishes.description: Stuffed duck leg in meat sauce with red wine, combined with mushrooms and seasonal vegetables - carrots, zucchini, onions. When served, there is a slight spiciness of pepper and the freshness of parsley.

dishes.title: Salmon with fennel and prosecco sauce
dishes.description: Tender salmon in an oyster sauce glaze, served with a creamy fennel and prosecco sauce. Garnished with sour lemon, aromatic herb breading, fried rice flakes and cornflower flowers.

dishes.title: Carp in sour cream with porcini mushrooms
dishes.description: Podilskyi carp, fried with onions and porcini mushrooms, stewed in sour cream. It is served with potatoes in the Ulanov style - according to an old recipe from Podillia.

dishes.title: Ribeye steak from Ukrainian beef gr
dishes.description:
1. Classic ribeye with fried potatoes

Moist aged ribeye over 21 days, with a balanced texture and natural juiciness. Recommended roasts are Medium / Medium Rare.

Served with crispy fried potatoes, delicately sprinkled with Parmesan, which subtly emphasizes the taste of the meat.

2. Pepper steak

A similarly aged ribeye, served with a classic Black Pepper sauce that creates a rich peppery accent. The dish is served without a side dish, in a pure gastronomic style.

The decoration includes roasted green onions, green canned pepper and a pinch of Drogobych salt.


The dish is weighty. The price is indicated for 1 kg.

The approximate weight of one steak is 350–400 g.

dishes.title: Aperol Spritz cocktail
dishes.description:
Aperol, Sparkling Wine, Soda




Aroma: light orange, slightly herbal

Taste: refreshing, bittersweet, light orange aftertaste

dishes.title: Fresh Tagliatelle Carbonara
dishes.description: House-made tagliatelle, crafted in the spirit of Podillia and Italy, cooked al dente and enveloped in a silken carbonara sauce of golden yolk, Parmigiano Reggiano, and butter. Crowned with the savory essence of pancetta and a whisper of nutmeg — a union of rustic heritage and Renaissance elegance, as if from the table of Queen Bona herself.

dishes.title: Strawberry Aperol Spritz cocktail
dishes.description:
Aperol, Sparkling Wine, Soda, Strawberry Syrup




Aroma: fruity, sweet, orange-berry

Taste: sweet-fresh, with a slight bitterness of Aperol, berry aftertaste

dishes.title: Limoncello Spritz cocktail
dishes.description:
Limoncello, Mandarin Syrup, Sparkling Wine



Aroma: citrus freshness, light sweetness

Taste: refreshing, sweet-sour, light sparkling

dishes.title: Fresh Bolognese pasta
dishes.description: Homemade tagliatelle in rich Bolognese sauce with beef, tomatoes, celery, carrots and bacon. The final note is Parmigiano Reggiano cheese.

dishes.title: Ravioli with pumpkin and amaretto cookies
dishes.description: Italian ravioli with a tender filling of baked pumpkin, parmesan, lemon zest and amaretto cookies. The dish is served in an exquisite sauce of gorgonzola and pumpkin oil, garnished with pumpkin seeds and a crumb of amaretto, which gives a special aroma and texture.

dishes.title: Porn Star Martini cocktail
dishes.description:
Vodka, Passion Fruit Vodka, Passion Fruit Syrup, Vanilla Syrup, Orange Juice, Sparkling Wine



Aroma: tropical, vanilla, citrus

Taste: sweet, fruity, refreshing with a light sparkle

dishes.title: Gin and Tonic cocktail
dishes.description:
Gin, Fresh Lime, Tonic



Aroma: juniper, citrus, grassy

Taste: refreshing, bitter-citrus, dry

dishes.title: Fresh pasta with tomatoes and basil according to Carlo Bianca's recipe
dishes.description: Home-made tagliatelle with a light dressing of fresh tomatoes and basil. Served with Parmigiano Reggiano cheese - the taste of summer in an elegant presentation.

dishes.title: Fresh pasta with salmon, sun-dried tomatoes and gorgonzola
dishes.description: Freshly cooked handmade pasta with tender salmon, aromatic sun-dried tomatoes and a creamy sauce based on gorgonzola cheese.

dishes.title: Gin Garden Twist cocktail
dishes.description:
Gin, Elderflower Syrup, Apple Juice, Fresh Lemon, Sparkling Wine, Mint



Aroma: apple, mint, floral notes

Taste: refreshing, fruity, slightly sparkling

dishes.title: Pasta with strachatela and tomatoes
dishes.description: Tomato base, Parmesan, olive oil, garlic, onion, basil, Strachatella from Podol.

dishes.title: Gin Garden cocktail
dishes.description:
Gin, Elderflower Syrup, Apple Juice, Fresh Lemon



Aroma: apple, elderflower notes

Taste: fruity-floral, refreshing, light acidity

dishes.title: Whiskey Sour cocktail
dishes.description:
Bourbon, Fresh Lemon, Sugar Syrup, Egg Foam, Angostura



Aroma: citrus, caramel, light spice

Taste: sweet and sour, mild bourbon aftertaste, light bitterness

dishes.title: Ravioli with duck and pumpkin seeds
dishes.description: Homemade ravioli with tender duck and vegetables, in a sauce of roasted Bulgarian pepper and saffron. When serving, decorate with pumpkin seeds and Parmigiano Reggiano cheese.

dishes.title: New York Sour cocktail
dishes.description: Bourbon, Fresh Lemon, Sugar Syrup, Port Wine, Egg Foam

dishes.title: Ravioli with ricotta and parmesan
dishes.description: Classic home-made ravioli with delicate ricotta, in a cream-parmesan sauce on chicken broth. End with a delicate cheese note.

dishes.title: Clover Club cocktail
dishes.description:
Pink Gin, Cointreau, Fresh Lemon, Raspberry Syrup, Egg Foam




Aroma: raspberry, citrus, light floral accent

Taste: sweet and sour, fruity, delicate texture

dishes.title: Pasta alla Puttanesca
dishes.description: Tomato base, anchovies, olives, olives, parmesan, capers, butter, olive oil, garlic, onion, basil.

dishes.title: Margarita cocktail
dishes.description:
Tequila, Cointreau, Fresh Lime, Agave Syrup




Aroma: lime, agave, citrus

Taste: sweet and sour, refreshing, classic texture

dishes.title: Cocktail Espresso Martini with Ice Cream
dishes.description:
Vodka, Coffee Liqueur, Espresso, Salted Caramel Syrup, Ice Cream




Aroma: coffee, vanilla, sweet caramel

Taste: rich coffee, sweet, creamy aftertaste

dishes.title: Negroni cocktail
dishes.description:
Gin, Campari, Vermouth




Aroma: juniper, herbal, bitter

Taste: bitter-dry, balanced, classic aftertaste

dishes.title: Cocktail Selo&People
dishes.description:
White Rum, Strawberry Syrup, Yogurt Liqueur, Cream




Aroma: berry, creamy, light floral accent

Taste: sweet, creamy, strawberry aftertaste

dishes.title: Edem cocktail
dishes.description: Apple Pie Syrup, Limoncello, Fresh Lemon, Apple Juice, Egg Foam

dishes.title: Raspberry Mai Tai cocktail
dishes.description:
White Rum, Black Rum, Gold Rum, Cointreau, Lime Fresh, Raspberry Puree, Lychee Syrup, Orange Juice




Aroma: tropical, raspberry, citrus

Taste: fruity, sweet and sour, refreshing

dishes.title: Tiki Tak cocktail
dishes.description: Tiki Rum, Fresh Lemon, Pineapple Juice, Passion Fruit Puree, Black Rum

dishes.title: Wild Negroni cocktail
dishes.description:
Blackberry Gin, Aperol, Vermouth




Aroma: berry, herbal, orange

Taste: bitter-fruity, rich, refreshing

dishes.title: Purple QUEEN
dishes.description: Purple QUEEN is a bright and balanced cocktail with a deep berry character. Rich black currant in gin is harmoniously combined with the fresh acidity of fresh lemon and the mild sweetness of sugar syrup. Air foam adds a velvety texture and sophisticated look. Fresh, fragrant.

dishes.title: BONA Love
dishes.description: This cocktail opens with a rich woody vanilla base of whiskey that smoothly transitions into juicy cherry and pineapple motifs. Fresh lemon refreshes, reveals fruity notes. The taste harmoniously combines sweet, sour and mild whiskey strength, leaving behind a pleasant fruity aftertaste.

dishes.title: Will go with vegetables
dishes.description:
Pide is a classic Turkish street food. Yeast dough is used as a basis, rolled into a thin cake. The filling is placed on the cake and the edges are rolled up. It is baked in a wood-fired oven at a high temperature.

Vegetable filling, sauce based on ripe tomatoes, and vegetables roasted on coal. Blue onion, zucchini, eggplant. Garnished with greens and Greek yogurt.

dishes.title: Goes with minced beef and vegetables
dishes.description:
Pide is a classic Turkish street food. Yeast dough is used as a basis, rolled into a thin cake. The filling is placed on the cake and the edges are rolled up. It is baked in a wood-fired oven at a high temperature.

And the filling includes minced meat with vegetables - blue onions, tomatoes, zucchini, eggplant. Decorated with dill and parsley. Served with Greek yogurt.

dishes.title: Goes with cheese and greens
dishes.description:
Pide is a classic Turkish street food. Yeast dough is used as a basis, rolled into a thin cake. The filling is placed on the cake and the edges are rolled up. It is baked in a wood-fired oven at a high temperature.

Cheese will go, based on mozzarella with homemade cottage cheese and dill. Served with Greek yogurt.

dishes.title: Chorizo ​​pizza
dishes.description: Sophisticated dough on Italian flour, matured in cold fermentation for 36 hours. On the basis of the classic tomato sauce, delicate mozzarella, spicy and spicy chorizo ​​sausage are placed, and the taste is completed by a subtle touch of grated Parmesan.

dishes.title: Corona extra used
dishes.description: Belgian light filtered beer that is perfect for those looking for enjoyment without wanting to drink alcohol. It is made on the basis of corn according to the traditional recipes of the brewery, and is known for its exquisite taste and refreshing bitterness. This beer has all the characteristic features of its alcoholic version, such as a golden color, a rich wheat taste and a pleasant aroma.

dishes.title: Pear Gorgonzola pizza
dishes.description: Light dough after 36 hours of cold fermentation. The creamy sauce combines with tangy mozzarella, ripe conference pear and spicy gorgonzola, creating a classic Italian harmony of sweet and salty.

dishes.title: Pizza Romana
dishes.description: Dough on Italian flour, matured in cold fermentation for 36 hours. On a delicate creamy base - aromatic bacon, sweet red onion, noble gorgonzola and tender mozzarella, which create a delicate balance of taste.

dishes.title: Tiramisu pizza
dishes.description: An original dessert in the form of a pizza: a delicate base, topped with tiramisu cream based on mascarpone with delicate coffee notes and light cocoa. Soft, airy texture and familiar taste of the classic Italian dessert in a new, original presentation.

dishes.title: Pizza 4 cheeses
dishes.description: Sophisticated dough after cold fermentation for 36 hours. Gentle creamy sauce and a classic combination of four cheeses: creamy mozzarella, noble parmesan, expressive cheddar and spicy gorgonzola. A real symphony for gourmets.

dishes.title: Pizza Mortadella - Strachatella
dishes.description: Dough based on 36-hour cold fermentation is light, airy and easily absorbed. Creamy sauce, tender mozzarella and aged Parmesan create a rich cheesy base, which is complemented by creamy stracciatella. The final accent is aromatic mortadella and crunchy pistachios.

dishes.title: Pizza with prosciutto and cherries in port wine
dishes.description: Dough after 36-hour cold fermentation. Red tomato sauce, tender mozzarella, fresh rucola, exquisite prosciutto, aged Parmesan and juicy cherries stewed in port wine. The perfect combination of sophistication and gastronomic boldness.

dishes.title: Pizza Campagnola
dishes.description: Dough aged in cold fermentation for 36 hours. On the basis of a bright tomato sauce - tender mozzarella, juicy bacon, delicate ham, aged parmesan and spicy cheddar. A rich and hearty interpretation of traditional flavors.

dishes.title: Focaccia from the oven
dishes.description:
Focaccia with Italian herbs

Fermented dough baked in a real pizzeria oven. Sprinkled with Italian herbs and salt.

Served with homemade unrefined roasted sunflower oil from our field — from field to table!

dishes.title: Tandoori carp
dishes.description:
Carp fillet in a marinade of flower honey, mustard and lime juice, baked in a tandoor. Served with lemon, greens and white fish sauce.

The price is for 0.100g

dishes.title: Tandoori trout with herbs
dishes.description:
Trout, marinated and baked in a tandoor with thyme, rosemary and garlic. Served with lemon, fresh herbs and white fish sauce.

The price is for 100 grams.

dishes.title: Baked potatoes with lard in the tandoor
dishes.description: Potatoes, slowly baked in a tandoor until soft and ruddy. Fragrant lard melts inside, giving the dish juiciness and rich taste with light smoky notes.

dishes.title: Pork ribs in pomegranate glaze
dishes.description:
Juicy ribs cooked in a tandoor to a perfect crust, glazed with pomegranate sauce and garnished with pomegranate seeds. Served with Nizhyn cucumbers, fresh herbs and chili pepper, accompanied by satsebeli sauce.

The price is per 100 grams.

dishes.title: Pork kebab
dishes.description:
Juicy pork marinated according to a classic recipe and baked in a tandoor. Served with traditional side dishes and satsebeli sauce.

The price is for 100g of the finished product.

dishes.title: Chicken kebab
dishes.description:
Tender marinated pieces of chicken, fried in a tandoor on skewers. Served with Nizhyn cucumbers, green onions and chili peppers, with a creamy sauce.

The price is for 100 grams.

dishes.title: Staritsky & Levitsky Reserve
dishes.description:
Country of manufacture: Ukraine.

Exceptional Ukrainian vodka, based on the unique traditions of distilling and craftsmanship of the region. Vodka has a light, dry, delicate taste with soft intonations of wheat, a warming aftertaste of medium complexity and duration. The aroma is delicate, soft, clean, with a light grain flavor and subtle spiciness.

dishes.title: Nemiroff Lex
dishes.description:
Country of manufacture: Ukraine.

Taste: Soft, elegant, with light wheat notes

Aroma: Pleasant aroma with subtle floral, warm coriander and woody notes

dishes.title: Rada Classic
dishes.description:
Country of manufacture: Ukraine.

Drink taste: weightless, soft and warming.

Aroma: crystal vodka aroma.

dishes.title: Koskenkorva Original
dishes.description:
Country of manufacture: Finland.

Aroma: a pleasant bouquet with light barley notes

Taste: soft, harmonious taste with faint licorice shades

dishes.title: Ketel One
dishes.description:
Country of manufacture: The Netherlands.

Aroma: subtle notes of citrus fruits and honey can be felt in a pleasant bouquet

Taste: soft, velvety, with a subtle pleasant aftertaste.

dishes.title: Potatoes in the Ulan style
dishes.description: Golden potatoes fried with the aroma of garlic and fresh dill.

dishes.title: Fried potatoes with onions
dishes.description: Golden potatoes, fried until crispy in butter, with caramelized onions and a light aroma of fragrant herbs. Served in an aristocratic style — simple and elegant, as Queen Bona loved.

dishes.title: Polenta with young cheese and parmino
dishes.description: Tender polenta cooked in milk and cream, served with a combination of young cheese, refined parmino and parmesan. The dish is finished with aromatic pepper oil, which adds piquancy and a noble depth of taste.

dishes.title: Sweet potato with cheese sauce
dishes.description: Sweet potatoes are deep-fried, served with parmesan-based cheese sauce and pesto sauce.

dishes.title: Royal set of drinks BONA 250 ml
Children's broth with noodles and meatballs
Cutlets with turkey and cream sauce
Hennessy VS
dishes.description:
Colour: Clean and bright, with a beautiful amber tint.

Aroma: Initial notes of fresh toast with roasted almonds and brown sugar are complemented by a second wave of more delicate grape aromas.

Taste: Its aromatic intensity is reflected in a rich, creamy taste with an additional hint of vanilla, finished with a bright fresh and floral aftertaste.

dishes.title: Bona Cake
dishes.description: Our author's dessert, created in honor of Queen Bona and the Podil tastes of her time. At its heart is a poppy seed cake, a caramelized walnut frangipane, a tender sponge cake with cherry and pear confit. All this is topped with cream made from whipped sour cream and cream cheese, which reproduces the taste of a traditional Podillia wedding cake.

dishes.title: Hennessy VSOP
dishes.description:
Colour: light amber.

Taste of the drink: refined, harmonious, enveloping taste, with delicate notes of honey and a light taste of licorice; on the palate there are notes of candied fruit and roasted almonds.

Aroma: It has a very delicate aroma with subtle notes of oak and spicy hints of cinnamon and cloves.

dishes.title: Drunken plum cake
dishes.description: Exquisite Podilsk bread, where the tenderness of sour cream is combined with the aroma of smoked Hungarian and the nobility of hazelnuts. A dessert that preserves the taste of ancient traditions in a modern presentation.

dishes.title: Mango dessert
dishes.description: a royal combination of mango and passion fruit in the form of a mousse cake. A light sand base and an exquisite passion fruit cone create a dessert that combines the exotic with the Podil tradition of festive parties.

dishes.title: Remy Martin VSOP
dishes.description: The perfect harmony of dense and saturated shades of ripe fruits with subtle, barely perceptible notes of licorice creates a complex, multifaceted bouquet of this legendary cognac

dishes.title: "Ripe plum" dessert
dishes.description: A refined interpretation of the Podil dessert with sour cream and prunes. Smoked Hungarian sausage is combined with sour cream, and the shape of a ripe plum and serving on a chocolate "bark" with a golden sponge add noble theatricality.

dishes.title: Sweet pancakes with cherry and poppy seeds
dishes.description: Homemade pancakes based on Podil recipes, generously filled with cheese and vanilla. A combination familiar from childhood, in a modern presentation with the sourness of cherries and the crunch of almond flakes.

dishes.title: Spruce cottage according to an old recipe
dishes.description: Dessert made of delicate shortcrust pastry with aromatic cherry filling, laid out in the shape of a hut and covered with airy sour cream. The combination of light acidity of cherries and soft sweetness of cream creates a harmonious home taste.

dishes.title: Dessert "Classic Tiramisu"
dishes.description: Sophisticated interpretation of the classics: home-made Savoyardi, mascarpone cream, cream and eggs, rich coffee and noble amaretto liqueur. A separate accent is the gentle bitterness of cocoa, reminiscent of the Italian lands, from where Queen Bona came to Podillia.

dishes.title: Dessert "Apple"
dishes.description: A gentle mousse made of apple compote and mousse on a sand base, combining the natural sweetness of apples with a light crispness. A dessert that reproduces the aroma of a Podil garden in an elegant presentation.

dishes.title: Sigismund Bizet
dishes.description: a dessert reminiscent of noble dining traditions. Airy vanilla custard combines with crunchy meringue and fruity freshness to create a taste that Queen Bona herself could love.

dishes.title: Chocolate-Caramel Tart
dishes.description: A multi-layered dessert with a crunchy shortbread base, delicate chocolate cream and salted caramel. Garnished with roasted hazelnuts, which adds textural play and depth of taste.

dishes.title: Tart "Lemon"
dishes.description: A multi-layered dessert with a crispy shortbread base, fresh lemon mousse and compote, decorated with a thin gourmet glaze with the aroma of lemon zest. Light sourness and delicate texture create an elegant taste.

dishes.title: Classic Cheese with Caramel
dishes.description: A noble dessert with classic cream cheese on a sandy base, generously covered with salted caramel.

dishes.title: Lviv Cheesecake
dishes.description: Creamy homemade cheese, whipped with butter, eggs and raisins, baked to the perfect texture and decorated with a delicate chocolate glaze. A classic with a local character.

dishes.title: Basque cheesecake
dishes.description: Dessert prepared on the basis of cream cheese and baked for no more than half an hour at a high temperature.

dishes.title: Pana Kota dessert with tangerine
dishes.description: Italian Piedmont dessert made of cream, milk, sugar and gelatin.

dishes.title: Podilsky honey with apple chutney
dishes.description: Tender honey cakes soaked in a light sour cream based on cream, served with aromatic apple chutney - stewed apples with sugar, which add a soft fruity note to the dish.

dishes.title: Andruts with mascarpone and condensed milk
dishes.description: Crispy thin andruts, generously layered with a delicate mascarpone cream and boiled condensed milk. The dessert is complemented by kernels of roasted peanuts, which add a pleasant nutty aroma and a delicate crunchy accent. A sweet, rich and at the same time balanced taste that brings back childhood in a modern version.

dishes.title: Apple strudel with homemade ice cream
dishes.description:
Traditional Austrian dessert is a tender, crispy pastry filled with a fragrant filling of baked apples, cinnamon and raisins. Served hot with a scoop of home-made gelato, fresh seasonal berries, fruits and mint.

A hot dessert that gives real comfort!

dishes.title: Mandarin dessert
dishes.description: A sophisticated mousse dessert in the shape of a real tangerine, which impresses with its realism at first glance. Gentle tangerine mousse with bright citrus acidity hides a balanced filling, and the velvet coating repeats the texture of natural fruit. A light, refreshing and exquisite finale to the meal.

dishes.title: Podolsky napoleon with cherries
dishes.description: Napoleon" with a cherry layer in the cut. Thin cakes, delicate custard and bright cherry accents create a perfect contrast.

dishes.title: Apple Bonaparte
dishes.description: Delicate layers of puff pastry, cream that melts in your mouth, and a juicy apple layer - classic Napoleon with a light Podil note.

dishes.title: Tavria cognac
dishes.description:
Country of manufacture: Ukraine.

Taste: balanced, soft, full of notes of fruit and vanilla

Aroma: bright notes of flowers and fruits that delicately complement shades of oak

Color: light amber

dishes.title: Pumpkin bread with raisins and spices
dishes.description: Pumpkin bread with selected seeds - warm aroma, natural sweetness of pumpkin and crunchy accent in each piece.

dishes.title: Metaxa 5 Stars
dishes.description:
Colour: amber color with a beautiful golden hue

Taste: bright, perfectly balanced taste, filled with wonderful tones of peach, apricot, freshly baked brioche bun and raisins

Aroma: orange blossoms, subtle shades of rose and ripe apricot are gradually enriched with notes of vanilla, floral honey and violet.

dishes.title: Buckwheat bread with onions
dishes.description: Home-made buckwheat bread with caramelized onions - a deep, warm taste and natural aroma, created for the perfect combination with main dishes.

dishes.title: Saint Remy XO
dishes.description:
Colour: rich amber with bright golden highlights

Taste: rich and harmoniously sweet. The lingering aftertaste reveals shades of gingerbread, dates, figs and nuts

Aroma: mature, filled with notes of honey, dried fruit and vanilla, with hints of oak and spices

dishes.title: Metaxa  7 Stars
dishes.description:
Features of the taste: Brandy has a perfectly balanced structure, a warm, pleasantly spicy taste with distinct notes of honey and black raisins, which are captured in a long velvety aftertaste

The aroma of muscat and ripe peach are complemented by tones of prune, carob and honey from meadow herbs

dishes.title: Kamianetsky bread on dark beer
dishes.description: Kamyanetsky bread, baked on dark beer - a rich taste with malt nuances and a noble aroma, inspired by local traditions.

dishes.title: Bread pumpkin loaf 650g
dishes.description: Pumpkin bread with selected seeds - warm aroma, natural sweetness of pumpkin and crunchy accent in each piece.

dishes.title: Buckwheat bread loaf 600g
dishes.description: Home-made buckwheat bread with caramelized onions - a deep, warm taste and natural aroma, created for the perfect combination with main dishes.

dishes.title: Loaf of Kamianets bread 650g
dishes.description: Kamyanetsky bread, baked on dark beer - a rich taste with malt nuances and a noble aroma, inspired by local traditions.

dishes.title: Rye bread with fitness grains
dishes.description: Natural rye bread with a mixture of selected grains and seeds. It has a rich taste, a dense texture and a light nutty note. Rich in fiber, it complements light dishes well and is suitable for a balanced diet.

dishes.title: Gordon`s London dry
dishes.description: Gordon's London Dry, a gin with a bright juniper aroma, honored with many awards.

dishes.title: Gordon`s Tropical Passionfrut
dishes.description:
Taste of the drink: The original juniper taste of gin is harmoniously combined with notes of passion fruit.

Aroma: Fresh, rich, passion fruit, juniper.

dishes.title: Tanqueray London dry
dishes.description:
Features of taste - clean and fresh taste

Aroma - complex and multifaceted - juniper, coriander, allspice

dishes.title: Gin "Classic" Spicer 50 ml
dishes.description:
Spicer is a Ukrainian craft brand of premium quality 🇺🇦 It is made from natural ingredients, without artificial flavorings. Each position has its own character and unique flavor profile. 


Classic dry gin with juniper, citrus and light spice. It has a clean, fresh taste with a long aftertaste. Recommendation: perfectly combined with tonic, ice and a slice of lemon.

dishes.title: Gin "Flower" Spicer 50ml
dishes.description:
Spicer is a Ukrainian craft brand of premium quality 🇺🇦 It is made from natural ingredients, without artificial flavorings. Each position has its own character and unique flavor profile. 


Exquisite gin with the aroma of lavender, lilac and field herbs. It has a delicate floral bouquet and light sweetness. Recommendation: tastes great in light cocktails with fruit or with sparkling water and rosemary.

dishes.title: The Botanist
dishes.description: Distilled with 22 unique botanicals collected on the island of Isla: apple mint, thyme, heather, tansy, birch leaves and others. They give gin its subtle aroma and unique character, combining with 9 classic ingredients, including coriander, juniper berries, zest, licorice. The taste of the drink is rich and soft, at first a little cold, and later - warm and clean, with a dominant fresh tone of citrus fruits.

dishes.title: Captain Morgan Spiced Gold
dishes.description: The classic rum drink is aged in selected American white oak barrels for a deep, rich taste with hints of vanilla, fruit and brown sugar.

dishes.title: Captain Morgan Tiki Mango Pineapple
dishes.description: Captain Morgan Tiki Mango & Pineapple rum drink has absorbed the exotic aromas of the South Pacific islands. It's a combination of the iconic Captain Morgan rum and the natural flavors of pineapple and mango. The aroma of ripe pineapples is replaced by notes of soft juicy mango, turning into a bright double fruity taste.

dishes.title: Captain Morgan White
dishes.description: Captain Morgan white rum drink is made from the finest premium rums and distilled five times for a balanced, bright taste with a light sweetness. It will become an ideal base for a variety of exciting rum cocktails.

dishes.title: Ron Santiago de Cuba Anejo 8YO
dishes.description: Classic aroma of Cuban rum in a light style with typical aging notes. Perfectly balanced, undeniably soft and delicate, with notes of honey, vanilla and cocoa. A rhythmic blend in the mouth, this rum is a great choice for both cocktails and iced

dishes.title: Zacapa  Solera Gran Reserva 23 YO
dishes.description:
The aroma is a sweet multi-layered mixture of caramel, vanilla, cocoa and toffee.

The taste is complex, full-bodied, balanced with notes of honey, toffee, spiced oak and complex dried fruits, leather, cinnamon and ginger. Long warm spicy aftertaste.

dishes.title: Don Papa Baroko
dishes.description:
Bursting with bold, ripe tropical fruit flavors, silky smooth vanilla and a hint of dry toasted oak, Don Papa Baroko is rich and perfectly balanced, with hints of dried dates and raisins and toasted oak on the finish.

Don Papa Baroko is produced on the island of Negros in the Philippines. It is the result of a mixture with aged rum obtained by distillation from molasses known as "black gold", black gold produced in one of the many local factories on the island.

dishes.title: Captain Morgan Black Spiced
dishes.description:
Taste: Classic, very rich, spicy taste with hints of vanilla, cinnamon and other spices.

Aroma: Fairly soft bouquet presented with notes of honey and vanilla against the background of delicate oak tones.

dishes.title: Jarana Blanco  100% Blue Agave
dishes.description:
Taste: burning, with notes of agave and fruity undertones

Aroma: agave with herbal notes

dishes.title: Jarana Reposado 100% Blue Agave
dishes.description:
Taste: burning, with notes of pure agave

Aroma: agave with soft, sweet undertones

dishes.title: Sparkling wine "Shabo" Special Edition
dishes.description:
Elegant Ukrainian sparkling wine with a fresh, clean character.

Aroma: light notes of green apple, citrus peel and white flowers.

Taste: refreshing, harmonious, with pleasant acidity and delicate minerality.

dishes.title: Fatherʼs Wine Johaniter - White Dry
dishes.description: White dry wine, from the Fatherʼs Wine winery, grape variety - Johaniter. Fresh, with floral and fruity tones and a light mineral aftertaste.

dishes.title: Zelenytsi Ts - Bile Suhe
dishes.description:
White dry wine, from Zelenytsi winery, grape variety - Citronny Magaracha

Clean and balanced with light notes of pear, white flowers and fresh hay.

dishes.title: Zelenytsi MD - Bile Suhe
dishes.description:
White dry wine, from the Zelenytsi winery, grape variety - Muscat Dublyansky.

Natural, with bright acidity, tones of green apple, citrus and wild flowers.

dishes.title: Leleka wines Sukholymanskyi - White Dry
dishes.description:
White dry wine, from the Leleka Wines winery, grape variety - Sukholimansky White

Fruit-citrus palette, fresh acidity.

dishes.title: Fatherʼs Wine Pink Square - Pink Dry
dishes.description:
Pink dry wine, from the Fatherʼs Wine winery, grape variety - Jupiter.

A non-standard pink with berry and floral shades. Light, bright, with an intelligent character.

dishes.title: Zelenytsi GP - Pink dry
dishes.description:
Pink dry wine, from the Zelenytsi winery, grape variety - Gurzufsky pink.

Fresh, with notes of strawberries, raspberries and light acidity. Wine for every day - perfect with the evening.

dishes.title: Zelenytsi K - Red Dry
dishes.description:
Red dry wine, from Zelenytsi winery, grape variety - Cabernet Sauvignon.

Deep and structured red with shades of dark berries, spices and a light touch of oak.

dishes.title: Leleka wines Odesa Black - Red Dry
dishes.description:
Red dry wine, from the Leleka Wines winery, Odesa Black grape variety.

Wine from the south of Ukraine with soft tannins and notes of plum, cherry and black pepper.

dishes.title: Leleka wines - White Semi-sweet
dishes.description:
White semi-sweet wine, from the Leleka Wines winery, grape varieties - Aligote and Rkatitseli.

Aromatic white with a slightly sweet shade, peach-floral notes and a mild taste.

dishes.title: Leleka wines - Red Semi-sweet
dishes.description:
Red semi-sweet wine from the Leleka Wines winery, grape variety - Merlot.

Soft, with light sweetness and notes of ripe berries and jam. Ideal as a dessert or for a light evening.

dishes.title: Shabo "Merlot" grape ordinary table with/red aged
dishes.description:
Shabo Reserve Merlot wine

Exquisite dry red wine from the Shabo terroir. Made from carefully selected Merlot grapes grown on European vines adapted to Podil soils. Aged in oak barrels for 9-12 months, which gives the drink a deep taste and noble aroma.

Color: deep red with violet shades.

Taste: velvety, balanced, with notes of ripe berries and light oak spice.

dishes.title: Wine "Telti Kuruk Grand Reserve Shabo" s/white
dishes.description:
Shabo Original Collection Telti-Kuruk wine

Fine dry white wine from the autochthonous Ukrainian grape variety Telti-Kuruk, hand-picked in the Shabo terroir. This unique wine embodies the 200-year history of winemakers' craftsmanship and the inspiration of the Swiss immigrants who founded the Chabot settlement.

dishes.title: Italian wine Riondo "Pinot Grigio" delle Venezie DOC Sukh B.
dishes.description: Riondo Pinot Grigio delle Venezie DOC is an elegant white dry wine from the Veneto region of Italy. Made from Pinot Grigio, it has fresh aromas of green apple, pear and citrus. The taste is light, clean, with pleasant minerality and balanced acidity. Great for light dishes, salads and seafood.

dishes.title: Italian wine Riondo "Soave" DOC Sukh B.
dishes.description: Riondo Soave DOC is a sophisticated white dry wine from the Veneto region, made from the Garganega variety. It has a delicate aroma of white peach, citrus and floral shades. The taste is light, fresh, harmonious, with soft minerality and a clean aftertaste. Goes well with fish, salads and light dishes of Mediterranean cuisine.

dishes.title: Amalinda "Sauvignon Blanc" wine (dry, white, Spain)
dishes.description: Amalinda Sauvignon Blanc is a fresh white dry wine from Spain, made from 100% Sauvignon Blanc variety. It has a bright aroma of citrus, green apple and grassy nuances. The taste is light, very fresh, with pronounced acidity and a clean, aromatic aftertaste. Great for fish, salads and light snacks.

dishes.title: Wine Riondo "Valpolicella Superiore" DOC (dry, June, Italy)
dishes.description: Riondo Valpolicella Superiore DOC is an elegant dry red wine from Veneto, created from a traditional blend: Corvina 60%, Corvione 30% and Rondinella 10%. It has a rich aroma of ripe cherries, dark berries and delicate spicy herbal notes. The taste is harmonious, soft, with well-balanced acidity, velvety tannins and a pleasant, long aftertaste. Perfectly combined with pasta, meat dishes and cheeses.

dishes.title: Wine of Italy Riondo "Corvina" Veronese IGT H/Dry. Black
dishes.description: Riondo Corvina Veronese IGT is a dry red wine from Veneto, made from 100% Corvina. It is characterized by aromas of red berries, cherries and light spicy notes. The taste is light, harmonious, with soft tannins and a clean, fruity aftertaste. Excellent with pasta, meat and medium-aged cheeses.

dishes.title: Leleka Wines Sparkling B/NS
dishes.description:
Light and harmonious sparkling wine with a mild fruity character.

Aroma: ripe apple, pear, light floral notes.

Taste: balanced, with gentle sweetness and fresh acidity.

Aftertaste: pleasant, fruity, with delicate sparkling.

dishes.title: Wine "Merlot Chabot" n/s/red
dishes.description:
A rich red wine with a deep, rich taste.

Aroma: notes of ripe cherry, black currant and light spicy nuances.

Taste: soft and balanced, with delicate tannins and a pleasant fruity sweetness.

Aftertaste: long, velvety, with a light spicy note.

dishes.title: Wine Leleka wines pinot grigio b/s
dishes.description:
Sophisticated white wine with a delicate fruity character.

Aroma: fresh notes of green apple, pear and light citrus.

Taste: light and balanced, with pleasant acidity and delicate sweetness.

Aftertaste: refreshing, fruity, with subtle minerality.

dishes.title: Fathers Wine "Amber circle" (dry, white)
dishes.description:
Bright, rich, with notes of citrus fruits, dried fruits and a light oak shade.  

• Full-bodied and multi-faceted, with moderate acidity and pleasant tannins (slight astringency typical of wines macerated on the skin).  

• Taste nuances can resemble warm fruit notes - peach, orange peel and dried fruits.

dishes.title: Wine "Mushlya" table. dry white "Bakota Bay"
dishes.description:
Aroma: bright and fresh, with notes of lollipops, white flowers, ripe pineapple and tropical fruits.  

• Taste: juicy, fruity - melon, canned peach and light tropical motifs are felt in the taste.  

• The taste is well balanced, with pleasant acidity.

dishes.title: Tincture on buds "Kontabas" 50 ml
dishes.description:
Contabas tinctures are Ukrainian premium alcohol based on natural ingredients.

• "Brunka" is a tincture made from young birch buds, has a fresh, herbal aroma and a slight bitterness.

dishes.title: Tincture on buds "Kontabas honey" 50 ml
dishes.description:
Contabas tinctures are Ukrainian premium alcohol based on natural ingredients.

"Honey" is a tincture based on natural honey, soft, sweet, with a warm aftertaste.

dishes.title: Gin "Poppy" Spicer 50ml
dishes.description: Original tincture based on poppy seeds. It has a velvety taste with notes of vanilla, almond and a light spicy aftertaste

dishes.title: Fatherʼs Wine Johaniter - White Dry
dishes.description: White dry wine, from the Fatherʼs Wine winery, grape variety - Johaniter. Fresh, with floral and fruity tones and a light mineral aftertaste.

dishes.title: Fatherʼs Wine Chardonnay - White Dry
dishes.description: White dry wine, from the Fatherʼs Wine winery, grape variety - Chardonnay. The aroma contains notes of white peach and apple with oak notes of aging. There are creamy notes in the taste and texture, the wine has moderate acidity and a balanced taste.

dishes.title: Fatherʼs Wine Pink Square - Pink Dry
dishes.description:
Pink dry wine, from the Fatherʼs Wine winery, grape variety - Jupiter.

A non-standard pink with berry and floral shades. Light, bright, with an intelligent character.

dishes.title: Fatherʼs Wine Merlot - Red Dry
dishes.description:
Red dry wine, from the Fatherʼs Wine winery, grape variety - Merlot.

The taste of the wine shows a perfect balance between fruity saturation and silky tannins, which give it softness and perfection. The long aftertaste leaves a pleasant trail with light chocolate and spicy accents. Perfectly combined with pasta, veal and duck dishes, as well as with soft cheeses.

dishes.title: Fathers Wine "Amber circle" (dry, white)
dishes.description:
Bright, rich, with notes of citrus fruits, dried fruits and a light oak shade.  

Rich and multi-faceted, with moderate acidity and pleasant tannins (slight astringency typical of wine macerated on the skin).  

Taste nuances can resemble warm fruit notes - peach, orange peel and dried fruits.

dishes.title: Wine "Mushlya" table. dry white "Bakota Bay"
dishes.description:
Aroma: bright and fresh, with notes of lollipops, white flowers, ripe pineapple and tropical fruits.  

• Taste: juicy, fruity - melon, canned peach and light tropical motifs are felt in the taste.  

• The taste is well balanced, with pleasant acidity.

dishes.title: Moet & Chandon Brut Imperial
dishes.description:
The cult champagne of the Moët & Chandon wine house and the most popular champagne in the world. It was first created in 1869, and since then the wine embodies the unique style of the producer. Grapes are mainly from Premier and Grand Cru plots. The blend contains more than 200 crus. Aroma: intense aromas of green apple and citrus, minerals, white flowers, brioche and nuts

Taste: expressive, full-bodied wine with persistent foam and fine bubbles. Balanced acidity of gooseberry, fleshiness of peach, notes of white flowers and fruits with a very long-lasting spicy-pear aftertaste are felt in every sip.

dishes.title: Veuve Clicquot
dishes.description:
The yellow label is a sign of the quality and style of Veuve Clicquot. Thanks to large stocks of reserve wines, the style of champagne does not change for decades. The cellars of Veuve Clicquot (crayères) are built on the basis of medieval quarries in which chalk was mined. They stretch for more than 24 kilometers under Mount Saint-Niquez and maintain a constant temperature throughout the year. Since 2015, these cellars have become a UNESCO World Heritage Site.Aroma: a bright, complex bouquet radiating hints of peach, pear, plum, vanilla and toast

Taste: a full-bodied, complex wine with persistent thick foam and fine bubbles, balanced by citrus acidity, delicate texture and a very long aftertaste

dishes.title: Shabo Special Edition
dishes.description:
SHABO Special Edition

Sparkling wine from the own grapes of the Shabo terroir, created according to the Charmat Lungo technology with aging sur lie for up to 6 months. Refined, fresh, with a thin pearl and a delicate aroma.

dishes.title: Zelenytsi Pet Nut Blend #1 - Dry White
dishes.description:
Sparkling White dry wine, from the Zelenytsi winery, grape varieties - Assemblage.

Made according to Ancestral technology.

The aroma of the wine is expressive, rich with fruity notes. The taste is balanced and harmonious, with fruity notes and creamy tones.

dishes.title: Chandon Brut
dishes.description:
A classic from Chandon. The best for sparkling wines are Chardonnay and Pinot Noir grapes from vineyards at an altitude of 1000 - 1200 m above sea level. Climatic conditions will allow the grapes to ripen slowly, which provides fresh acidity.

Aroma: intense complex dominated by ripe white fruits, peaches, pineapple, lime, jasmine and brioche Taste: characterized by a distinct persistent game with small bubbles, mild acidity, a balanced complex profile and a long aftertaste.

dishes.title: Chandon Rose
dishes.description: It is a balance of freshness and creaminess. The combination of Chardonnay and Pinot Noir gives the wine silkiness, and the red fruit color is provided by the Malbec variety. The climate of the vineyards, located at an altitude of 1000 - 1200 m above sea level, allows the grapes to ripen slowly and retain fresh acidity

dishes.title: Sparkling wine Casa Defra "Prosecco Frizzante Spago" DOC (dry, b, Italy)
dishes.description:
Casa Defrà Prosecco DOC, grape varieties - Glera. An elegant Italian prosecco from the Veneto region.

Fresh, light and well-balanced, with aromas of green apple, pear and white flowers. The taste has a pleasant acidity, soft bubbles and a clean, dry finish.

dishes.title: Leleka Wines Sparkling B/NS
dishes.description:
Leleka Wines Semi-Dry white sparkling wine - Ukrainian semi-dry sparkling wine from the Odesa wine-growing region (south of Ukraine).

Fresh aroma of apple, pear and white flowers. The taste has light fruity sweetness, lively acidity and gentle bubbles. It is easy and refreshing to drink.

dishes.title: Koskenkorva  Passionfruit
dishes.description: Bright yellow in color, the aroma reveals bright notes of ripe passion fruit with light herbal nuances. A perfect balance of sweet, sour notes of fresh passion fruit framed by floral, mineral accents and even bitter tannins in the aftertaste.

dishes.title: Baileys The Original
dishes.description:
This is the sweetest combination of fine Irish whiskey and spirits, Irish cream, as well as rich flavors of chocolate and vanilla.

Aroma: Notes of cream and milk chocolate, favorably shaded by sweet vanilla and fruity tones of Irish whiskey.

Taste: Amazingly soft, delicate creamy taste with hints of chocolate.

dishes.title: Frangelico
dishes.description: The liqueur has an elegant, sensual taste with tones of roasted hazelnuts combined with notes of vanilla, berries, dark chocolate and other natural extracts that make the taste complex and the aftertaste smooth and long.

dishes.title: Riga Black Balsam
dishes.description:
This is a perfect harmony of sweet-sour taste with ripe berry aroma.

Taste: semi-bitter, sour-sweet notes with aroma of ripe berries.

dishes.title: Cointreau
dishes.description: Made from carefully selected sweet and bitter orange peels, the drink has a balance of freshness, bitterness and sweetness. Crystal clear texture and citrus palette.

dishes.title: Becherovka
dishes.description: This is a perfectly balanced mixture of herbs and spices. Its iconic taste is based on a balanced combination of about 20 herbs and spices from around the world. This unique mixture gives the liqueur a pleasant bittersweet taste and a bright golden color.

dishes.title: Jagermaster
dishes.description:
Colour: rich dark nut.

Taste: slightly bitter, balanced with pleasure and warming on the finish.

dishes.title: Jack Daniel's Apple
dishes.description: Fresh fruity taste and aroma of crisp green apples complement the sweetness of vanilla, brown sugar, caramel and characteristic woody notes of Jack Daniel's.

dishes.title: Jack Daniel's  Honey
dishes.description: The bold character of Jack Daniel's Old No 7, highlighted by shades of honey and nuts. The sweetness of natural honey harmoniously softens the distinct taste of whiskey, complements it with the flavors and aromas of nuts, molasses and maple syrup. It takes time to experience all the layers of its flavor.

dishes.title: O'Brian
dishes.description: Triple distillation results in a fresh and delicate product with a unique soft, refined and elegant taste.

dishes.title: Sensi Collezione Pinot Grigio wine
dishes.description: Wine of a pleasant straw color, which has an excellent structure and refreshing properties thanks to the Pinot Grigio grape variety

dishes.title: Jameson whiskey
dishes.description:
Aroma: a light floral aroma, complemented by spicy, woody and sweet notes.

Taste: a perfect combination of spicy, nutty and vanilla nuances, emphasized by sweet sherry and exceptional softness of taste.

dishes.title: Sensi Chianti Dalcampo - Red Dry
dishes.description: Classic Tuscan Chianti with refined character. A wine with a harmonious combination of ripe cherries, notes of leather and subtle spices. Elegant, mature, with soft tannins and a long velvety aftertaste.

dishes.title: Wine "Nero Oro" Grillo Sicilia DOC (B. Sukh, Italy) 0.75 ml
dishes.description: Wine "Nero Oro" Grillo Sicilia DOC is an elegant white dry wine from sunny Sicily, created from the famous local variety Grillo. It has a bright aroma of citrus fruits, ripe peach pulp and light floral notes. The taste is fresh, harmonious, with pleasant minerality and a long, clean aftertaste. Goes well with fish, seafood and light dishes of Mediterranean cuisine.

dishes.title: Wine "Nero Oro" Nero d'Avola Sicilia DOC (BLACK, DRY, Italy) 0.75ml
dishes.description: Nero Oro wine Nero d'Avola Sicilia DOC is a rich red dry Italian wine from Sicily. Made from 100% Nero d'Avola, it impresses with aromas of dark berries, cherries, prunes and light spices. The taste is velvety, full, with soft tannins and a long aftertaste. Goes well with meat dishes and aged cheeses.

dishes.title: Italian wine Tombacco Pecorino Terre Di Chieti, IGT, B. Suh, 0.75 ml
dishes.description: Tombacco “Pecorino” I.G.T. Terre d'Abruzzois a fresh and distinctive dry white wine from the Italian region of Abruzzo, made from 100% Pecorino. It has a pleasant aroma of citrus, white fruits and light floral and herbal notes. The taste is characterized by brightness, minerality and harmonious acidity, leaving a clean and long aftertaste. Ideal for fish, seafood and light dishes.

dishes.title: Wine Mandrarossa Nero d'Avola quiet, black
dishes.description:
Taste: harmonious and balanced, with velvety tannins - opens with fruity notes of red berries and spices.  

• Aroma: bright and persistent, with tones of red berries and spices.  

• Grapes: blend of Nero d'Avola, Frappato and Syrah varieties

dishes.title: Monkey Shoulder
dishes.description: Aroma: orange peel, vanilla, honey and spicy oak. Taste: soft vanilla with spicy undertones.

dishes.title: Johnnie Walker Red Label
dishes.description: demonstrates a bright golden yellow-hot color. The spiciness and freshness of elegant Speyside and Highland malts is revealed in the citrus aroma, complemented by notes of honey, aromatic herbs, spices and smoky undertones. The exotic combination of spicy Christmas pie cinnamon and fresh black pepper with anise explodes on the tongue. All this merges into a long final signature note with a hint of smoke.

dishes.title: Islay Mist Original
dishes.description: The taste of whiskey is bright, balanced, with characteristic peat shades, tones of citrus and a hint of tart smoke. The aroma of whiskey is dominated by notes of peat, seaweed and grain.

dishes.title: The Singleton of Dufftown 12 YO
dishes.description: Smooth, medium density whiskey. The first impressions bring tones of sweetness, nuts, rich fruit notes. Warm and pleasant shades of blackcurrant, sugar and espresso coffee appear next. With water, the texture of whiskey becomes even more pleasant, the sweetness is perfectly balanced by light acidity. The aftertaste is quite long, elegant, clear, warm, with delicate nut nuances

dishes.title: Glenmorangie Original  12 YO
dishes.description:
Aroma: with notes of peaches combined with the delicate sweetness of vanilla.

Taste: with notes of vanilla, delicate floral accents, which in the aftertaste ends with the taste of almonds, maple syrup and coconut.

dishes.title: Glenmorangie Quinta Ruban 14 YO
dishes.description: Shades of berries and fragrant nutmeg notes create a unique velvety taste with notes of dark mint chocolate and sweet orange, the aftertaste is rich, deep, with nuances of spicy plums, cocoa, a pinch of vanilla, orange and nuts.

dishes.title: Talisker 10 YO
dishes.description: The taste of the drink reveals peat smoke, black pepper, light shades of brine and dry barley, balanced by fruity elements. The aftertaste is long, with smoky coals toasting the malt and adding a caramelized richness.

dishes.title: Ardbeg Wee Beastie 5 YO
dishes.description: In the foreground, intense aromas of black pepper mingle with juicy pine resin and a sharp smell of smoke. Suddenly there is an explosive sensation in the mouth from chocolate, creosote and tar.

dishes.title: Bourbon Bulleit 95 RYE
dishes.description:
Taste: soft molasses, brown sugar and light spices create the necessary contrast for an almost creamy taste, and then honey and peaches meet with hints of caraway and licorice, and the dry aftertaste is warmed by accents of cinnamon and anise

Aroma: in the bouquet, the aroma of cherry and vanilla intertwine with subtle notes of leather and wood, imbued with nuances of lemon with black pepper, cloves and nutmeg nut

dishes.title: Jack Daniel's  Old №7
dishes.description: Amber shade. Vanilla aroma. A balanced, soft taste with hints of orange, brown sugar and spices, and a long, rich aftertaste.

dishes.title: Bourbon Bulleit
dishes.description: Demonstrates an amber color of medium intensity. The aroma, characteristic of bourbon, reveals a bouquet with delicate spices and a sweet aroma of oak. The taste is spicy, with tones of leather and tobacco leaves, followed by orange notes, then the drink opens with notes of maple, oak, raisins, peaches, cherries and sponge cake. The aftertaste is dominated by cloves and cinnamon, which end with a candy delight.
